name: New-Wave Eggplant Parmigiano
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fresh tomatoes (peeled, seeded, and juiced) or quality canned diced tomato
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggplants into 24 slices.
2. Place a large nonstick skillet over high heat. Coat each slice with extra virgin olive oil or dip in oil and scrape excess with a spatula.
3. Brown the eggplant slices in one layer for 3-4 minutes per side, transferring them to a plate as they are done.
4. Blend tomatoes, basil, garlic, salt, and pepper until smooth.
5. Cut mozzarella into 8 slices. Place 8 eggplant slices on a nonstick baking pan and spread each with tomato puree in a thin layer.
6. Top each with a piece of mozzarella, another eggplant slice, more tomato sauce, and another piece of mozzarella.
7. Cover with a third eggplant slice and additional tomato sauce.
8. Let stacks rest for 30 minutes (liquid oozing is fine).
9. Preheat oven to 400°F.
10. Bake stacks for 15-20 minutes until bubbly and browned, then sprinkle with grated Parmigiano.
11. Rest before serving.
Yield: 4 to 8 servings
